title: Tribe seeks public comment on Kahtnu Area Transit
summary: The Kenaitze Indian Tribe is seeking public comment on its planned fixed-route bus service. Public comment on the Tribe’s fixed-route bus service, Kahtnu Area Transit, may be submitted in-person at the joint Soldotna and Kenai Chambers of Commerce luncheon from noon to 1 p.m. on June 28 at the Soldo...

title: Benefits of Practicing Mindfulness
summary: Benefits of Practicing Mindfulness By Public Relations Specialist Levi Oyster Mindfulness has long been practiced in Alaska Native culture and values to stay grounded in the present. title: Adding Pediatric Support Teams to Primary Care
summary: Adding Pediatric Support Teams to Primary Care By Southcentral Foundation Public Relations and Corporate Communications Well-child visits will include four or more appointments with integrated pediatric teams before age 3. title: Gifting Wellness to the Future Through Vaccinations
summary: Gifting Wellness to the Future Through Vaccinations By Public Relations Specialist Addison Arave In the early 1940s, an influx of settlers introduced new diseases to Alaska Native populations.
